name: zuvo-marketplace
description: Zuvo — auto-activating, multi-agent skill ecosystem for Claude Code

plugins.name: zuvo
plugins.description: 49 skills, 26 specialized agents, quality gates, knowledge store, session recovery, adversarial review (4 providers), and structured workflows. Full SDLC pipeline: brainstorm → plan → execute → ship → deploy → canary → retro. Supports Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
